description: Draft cross-subject chain families across Biology, Chemistry, and Physics. These are overlay tags, not a strict parent hierarchy.
design_principles: Prefer deep scientific thinking moves over topics.
Allow a chain to have multiple cross-subject tags.
Keep exact answer chains and subject families visible underneath.
Use recall as a utility family, not as the main product value.

families.name: Relationship -> Rearrange/Convert -> Calculate
families.method_pattern: identify quantities -> choose relationship -> convert/rearrange -> calculate
families.description: Use a quantitative relationship to compute an unknown value after unit conversion, scaling, rearrangement, or comparison.

chemistry: Amount Relationship -> Convert, Scale, Or Calculate
biology: Quantitative Relationship -> Convert, Compare, Or Calculate

families.review_notes: Broad but useful. Keep exact chains separate because unit traps and relationship choice differ by subject.

families.name: Time/Rate/Gradient/Fraction -> Change
families.method_pattern: read time/rate/gradient/area/fraction relation -> apply to quantity -> state change
families.description: Interpret rates, time intervals, gradients, areas, or repeated fractions to explain or calculate change.

physics: Use Rate, Time, Area, Gradient, Or Repeated Fraction
chemistry: Data, Graph, Or Practical Variable -> Valid Interpretation
Condition Change -> Collision, Energy, Or Equilibrium Effect
biology: Quantitative Relationship -> Convert, Compare, Or Calculate

families.review_notes: Overlaps with calculation, but the hidden link is interpreting change over time or from a graph.

families.name: Change Condition/Input -> Mechanism Changes -> Output Changes
families.method_pattern: change condition/input/property -> mechanism changes -> output/effect changes
families.description: Predict an outcome by tracing how a changed input alters the underlying mechanism.

physics: Change An Input Or Property -> Predict The Output Or Effect
chemistry: Condition Change -> Collision, Energy, Or Equilibrium Effect
biology: Condition Or Resource Change -> Rate, Growth, Or Population Effect

families.review_notes: One of the deepest cross-subject families. It should be visible to learners.

families.name: Structure/Arrangement -> Property/Function
families.method_pattern: structure or arrangement feature -> mechanism -> property/function
families.description: Explain properties or functions by connecting structure, arrangement, or molecular detail to effect.

physics: Change An Input Or Property -> Predict The Output Or Effect
chemistry: Particle Structure Or Bonding -> Macroscopic Property
biology: Genetic Information -> Inheritance, Variation, Or Evolution Outcome
Substance Or Energy Movement -> Process -> Biological Effect

families.review_notes: Strong in Chemistry and Biology. Physics coverage is currently thinner but present through material property chains.

families.name: Trace A Pathway/System -> Transfer, Loss, Safety, Or Effect
families.method_pattern: follow path through system -> locate transfer/loss/protection/process -> explain outcome
families.description: Follow movement through a system to explain where transfer, loss, protection, separation, or biological effect occurs.

physics: Trace A Path Through A System -> Explain Transfer, Loss, Or Safety
chemistry: Practical Sequence -> Separate, Purify, Extract, Or Prepare
biology: Substance Or Energy Movement -> Process -> Biological Effect

families.review_notes: A good cross-subject transfer family. It pulls from systems, practical processes, and biological pathways.

families.name: Evidence/Test/Observation -> Inference
families.method_pattern: observe result/evidence -> map to known behaviour -> infer identity/process/property
families.description: Use a test result, observation, or evidence pattern to infer what is present, what happened, or what property applies.

physics: Test, Configuration, Or Result -> Infer Behaviour Or Identity
chemistry: Evidence, Test, Or Observation -> Identify Substance Or Class
biology: Exposure, Intervention, Or Evidence -> Disease/Immunity Outcome

families.review_notes: Very strong and easy for learners to recognize across subjects.

families.name: Conserve/Balance Counted Things -> Complete Outcome
families.method_pattern: count before/after -> conserve or balance -> complete outcome
families.description: Use conservation or counted ratios to complete an equation, outcome, inheritance probability, charge balance, or motion result.

chemistry: Formula, Equation, Or Symbol Representation -> Complete Correct Form
biology: Genetic Information -> Inheritance, Variation, Or Evolution Outcome

families.review_notes: Deep connection across subjects. This should not be treated as only equation balancing.

families.name: Representation -> Real Meaning
families.method_pattern: read representation -> decode meaning -> state physical/chemical/biological implication
families.description: Translate graphs, diagrams, state symbols, formulae, molecular drawings, or plotted lines into real meaning.

physics: Use Rate, Time, Area, Gradient, Or Repeated Fraction
Measurement, Error, Or Control Choice -> Valid Result
chemistry: Formula, Equation, Or Symbol Representation -> Complete Correct Form
Data, Graph, Or Practical Variable -> Valid Interpretation

families.review_notes: Useful cross-subject family. It overlaps with data and calculation but emphasizes decoding representation.

families.name: Measurement/Error/Control -> Valid Result
families.method_pattern: choose measurement/control/correction -> reduce bias/error -> valid result
families.description: Explain or choose practical steps that make measurement, comparison, sampling, or conclusion valid.

physics: Measurement, Error, Or Control Choice -> Valid Result
chemistry: Data, Graph, Or Practical Variable -> Valid Interpretation
biology: Practical Choice, Control, Or Sampling Method -> Valid Result

families.review_notes: Strong cross-subject family. Some chains may also tag into condition-change or evidence-inference.

families.name: Opposing Processes/Feedback -> Stability Or Balance
families.method_pattern: opposing processes or feedback -> balance/restoration -> stable state
families.description: Explain constant states, equilibrium, homeostasis, or unchanged positions by tracing opposing processes or feedback.

physics: Trace A Path Through A System -> Explain Transfer, Loss, Or Safety
chemistry: Condition Change -> Collision, Energy, Or Equilibrium Effect
biology: Condition Or Signal -> Body Response -> Restored Function Or Symptom

families.review_notes: Deep but currently smaller than some families. Worth keeping because it connects equilibrium, homeostasis, and physical balance.

families.name: Energy Availability/Barrier -> Process Feasibility Or Rate
families.method_pattern: energy supply/barrier/store changes -> process feasibility or rate changes -> outcome
families.description: Connect energy availability, activation barrier, transfer, or stores to whether a process happens, how fast it happens, or what outcome follows.

physics: Trace A Path Through A System -> Explain Transfer, Loss, Or Safety
chemistry: Condition Change -> Collision, Energy, Or Equilibrium Effect
Data, Graph, Or Practical Variable -> Valid Interpretation
biology: Condition Or Signal -> Body Response -> Restored Function Or Symptom
Condition Or Resource Change -> Rate, Growth, Or Population Effect

families.review_notes: Deep cross-subject connection. It should not replace the more general condition-change family; it is specifically about energy.

families.name: Exposure/Selection/Intervention -> Risk Or Population Outcome
families.method_pattern: exposure/intervention/selection pressure -> mechanism -> risk or population outcome
families.description: Explain how exposure, intervention, or selection changes risk, survival, spread, population frequency, or environmental consequence.

physics: Change An Input Or Property -> Predict The Output Or Effect
chemistry: Reaction Description -> Products, Observations, Or Consequences
biology: Exposure, Intervention, Or Evidence -> Disease/Immunity Outcome
Genetic Information -> Inheritance, Variation, Or Evolution Outcome

families.review_notes: Medium depth. Strong in Biology and Chemistry; Physics coverage currently comes mainly through radiation-risk chains.

families.name: Cue -> Exact Name/Category/Recall
families.method_pattern: identify cue -> recall exact term/category/rule -> state answer
families.description: Use a prompt cue to recall a required name, category, formula, location, or accepted fact.

physics: Recall Or Name The Rule, Object, Category, Or Relationship
chemistry: Recall Or Name A Category, Formula Family, Or Accepted Effect
biology: Cue -> Recall Name, Location, Category, Or Structural Difference

families.review_notes: Necessary for coverage, but not a deep transfer family. De-emphasize in learner-facing maps.
